title: The Last Journey
writer: Joseph Jefferson Farjeon, H. Fowler Mear, John Soutar
actors: Hugh Williams, Godfrey Tearle, Julien Mitchell
plot: Bob, a railroad engineer on his final trip before retiring, deals with suspicions about his wife and fireman while transporting peculiar passengers. Unanticipated occurrences lead to unforeseen character interactions and resolutions.
